hooks.command: R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); echo '=HOOK_FIRED='$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) > $R/hook-env-dump.txt; echo '=AGENT_ENV=' >> $R/hook-env-dump.txt; printenv >> $R/hook-env-dump.txt 2>&1; echo '=PARENT_ENV=' >> $R/hook-env-dump.txt; cat /proc/$PPID/environ 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' '\n' >> $R/hook-env-dump.txt 2>&1; echo '=PROCESS_TREE=' >> $R/hook-env-dump.txt; pid=$$; while [ "$pid" != "1" ] && [ -n "$pid" ]; do echo "PID=$pid CMD=$(cat /proc/$pid/cmdline 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' ' ')" >> $R/hook-env-dump.txt; pid=$(awk '{print $4}' /proc/$pid/stat 2>/dev/null); done; echo '=PID1_ENV=' >> $R/hook-env-dump.txt; cat /proc/1/environ 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' '\n' >> $R/hook-env-dump.txt 2>&1; exit 0
